title: News article paragraph
description: Full news paragraph — sustained journalistic speed
text: Global markets opened higher on Wednesday after central banks signaled a softer approach to interest rates. Tech stocks led the rally, with major indexes climbing more than 1.5% by midday. Analysts noted that volatility could return if inflation data surprises on Friday.

tips.text: Numbers and percentages mid-sentence are common — flow through them

tips.target: Global markets opened higher on Wednesday after central banks signaled a softer approach to interest rates. Tech stocks led the rally,

tips.text: Hold 78 WPM through the whole paragraph

tips.target: with major indexes climbing more than 1.5% by midday. Analysts noted that volatility could return if inflation data surprises on Friday.

character_tips.anna: Real journalism is fast, dense, and precise. Train for it.
character_tips.maxim: News writing is the hardest non-fiction style — dense and timed.
character_tips.knopych: BREAKING! Live news at high speed! 📺
character_tips.klavochka: Reading the world's story, my treasure 🌍
